consent_checks: Document applicable region profile and consent basis.
Confirm CMP or custom banner ownership before collection.
Set consent defaults before Google tags fire when consent is required.
Document denied-state behavior for analytics and advertising storage.
Review data redaction and unwanted PII handling before launch.
Route legal sufficiency questions to the accountable human owner.

blocking_rules.pii_risk_high: Reject the plan until the parameter is removed, hashed only where officially allowed, or replaced with a non-PII surrogate.
blocking_rules.missing_legal_owner: Reject mutation recommendation until legal_review_owner is supplied.
